data_basis: pre-KBO Savant hitters 22 rows; pre-KBO MiLB pitchers 49 rows; structured numeric data only
model_or_algorithm: hitter: Ridge Logistic Regression success/failure classifier; pitcher: Sparse L1 Logistic Regression diagnostic
objective: learn KBO foreign-player success/failure pattern from historical examples
validation_or_gate: hitter success AUC 0.833; hitter failure AUC 0.738; pitcher success AUC 0.603 watch only
main_hitter_output: Luis Matos; Nolan Jones; Dylan Carlson
main_pitcher_output: Bryse Wilson; Austin Gomber; Dietrich Enns as negative-margin hold
how_to_use_in_final: use hitter result as strongest model-supported board; use pitcher result as diagnostic lead only
limitation: small historical sample; pitcher model not strong enough for final recommendation; salary not fully embedded

analysis_type: structured six-stage pipeline with backtest and composite ranking
data_basis: STATIZ 2026 SSG situational weakness; KBO foreign-player 2017-2025 first-year labels; DFA/FA/Outrighted market; AAA/MLB/Savant numeric features
model_or_algorithm: six-stage pipeline; SSG Fit 40% + KBO translated performance 40% + acquisition tier 20%
objective: connect SSG hidden weakness to realistic foreign-player market and KBO translation
validation_or_gate: 42 hitter and 86 starter backtest labels; final A/B/C acquisition tiers
main_hitter_output: Weston Wilson; Christopher Morel; Jack Suwinski; Michael Toglia; Nolan Jones
main_pitcher_output: Carson Spiers; Brian Van Belle; Victor Mederos; Cooper Criswell
how_to_use_in_final: use as presentation backbone for 1-6 process and SSG-fit explanation
limitation: composite weights require justification; not a pure learned classifier

data_basis: MLB/MiLB candidate pool; Statcast pitch-type xwOBA; MiLB pitcher K9/BB9/HR9; roster/contract status
model_or_algorithm: base lane_2 + stable_top25 queue; additional filters for break/off-speed xwOBA, low-velo xwOBA, BB9 <= 3.5, third-time wOBA
objective: remove candidates whose MLB/MiLB shape will not translate to KBO pitch mix or ABS environment
validation_or_gate: 736 hitters and 1009 pitchers reduced to 22/23 then final 5/5; medical hold excluded; data-connection error player excluded
main_hitter_output: Trey Mancini; Dominic Fletcher; Nolan Jones; Abraham Toro; Luis Rengifo
main_pitcher_output: Josh Fleming; Ian Hamilton; Noah Murdock; Jhonathan Diaz; Matt Bowman
how_to_use_in_final: use as KBO adaptation and risk-filter evidence; especially useful for explaining why some high-score candidates are removed
limitation: several filters are expert/rule based; third-time data missing for some pitchers

data_basis: KBO/STATIZ team/player data; MLB/MiLB official stats; Statcast/Savant batted-ball and pitch data; roster/transactions
model_or_algorithm: feature-engineered ranking: power quality, contact stability, KBO translation gap, SSG fit, command, HR suppression, groundball fit, durability
objective: find MLB fringe players whose hidden strengths become more valuable in KBO/SSG environment
main_hitter_output: Jack Suwinski; Michael Toglia; Matthew Lugo; Rece Hinds; Josh Lowe
main_pitcher_output: Josh Fleming; Randy Dobnak; Spencer Bivens; Hunter Barco; Bruce Zimmermann
how_to_use_in_final: use as market inefficiency/upside board and feature schema for scouting review
limitation: not directly trained on KBO success labels; narrower slot scope
